items.title: I’d recommend :)
items.summary: Morimens has one of the most unique rogue like battle systems in any Gacha game I’ve played(and I’ve played many) and besides that the story is pretty solid though at times the English translation can sometimes be a little wonky but is too be expected as it is a ‘beta’ translation. I hope this game will have a long life span as I feel that (though kinda cringe) is a diamond in the rough in the oversaturated Gacha game industry.
items.author: Witiria
